ValidationRule.description: Nur HR darf gewisse Daten eines Mitarbeitenden ändern
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( $User.PS480FunctionValidationRulesActive__c =true, $User.IsHRManager__c = false, $User.PS160RoleITManager__c = false, OR( ISCHANGED(Title), ISCHANGED(Alias), ISCHANGED(FirstName), ISCHANGED(LastName), ISCHANGED(CompanyName), ISCHANGED(ManagerId) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You are not allowed to change some data of your User Profile. Please get in touch with HR. (US002)
